name: Guizhou Salvage Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guizhou Salvage Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. primarily produces and sells urea in China. It offers nitrogenous fertilizer, phosphate fertilizer, compound fertilizer, synthetic ammonia, sulfur, and other chemical products and raw materials; fine chemical products; industrial hydrogen; and packing bags and plastic sheets. The company also purchases and sells methanol, dimethyl ether, hydrogen peroxide, formaldehyde, sodium hydroxide, sodium carbonate, and N-methyl-pyrrolidone. It offers urea under the Red brand. Guizhou Salvage Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Guiyang, China.
